app.title: Tabletop Traits
app.subtitle: Discover which board game mechanisms you love (and hate) based on your BGG ratings.

sync.coldStartHint: This can sometimes take up to a minute

scoring.label: Scoring method
scoring.arithmeticDesc: Simple average of all your ratings for games with this mechanism.
scoring.bayesianDesc: Accounts for sample size - mechanisms with fewer games are pulled closer to your overall average.
scoring.medianDesc: The middle rating when sorted. Ignores unusually high or low scores.
scoring.trimmedDesc: Average after dropping your highest and lowest 10% of ratings.
scoring.confidenceDesc: Favors mechanisms where your ratings are consistently high across many games.
scoring.positiveRateDesc: Percentage of games you rated 7 or higher ('Good game' on BGG).
